title: NODE 001 — The Daisy Field

features.name: the first casing, in its burled knot
features.desc-on-touch: A loose bark plate shields the tubed antenna. The LED breathes. It has been transmitting since before the corruption, and it is transmitting now.

features.name: the flattened grass where she slept
features.desc-on-touch: Fields of flannel and everlasting daisies and billy buttons and mulla mulla, beneath variations of daylight and noon. The shape of her is still filed here.

features.name: the original index
features.desc-on-touch: index.html · README.txt · /audio · /text · /images. Three hundred bits per second, to anyone with a wireless device from the past twenty years.

features.name: a solar trace, half-buried
features.desc-on-touch: A ribbon of cable under the grass, warm as an animal. It runs toward every other node there is, by more routes than anyone chose.

inscription: you don't need every node to speak to every other node. you need enough routes that the message can survive losing one

file.name: README.txt
file.note: WELCOME TO ROOT. Take what you need. Leave the antenna as you found it. — L & K

exits.label: the fire trail toward the river recording
a line of casings toward the service station
a route that flickers like a screen
